title: doryopteris varians var. angularis
intro: Doryopteris varians var. angularis, also known as the angular tree fern, is a species of plant in the family Marattiaceae. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Doryopteris varians var. angularis include its ability to reduce fever, relieve respiratory issues, and support digestive health. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, with the leaves and rhizomes being used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
